title: Unique Umami Argentinian Penne Rigate Pasta
description: A sour and chewy Argentinian dish featuring penne rigate pasta, katsuramuki-cut vegetables, and a blend of umami flavors, perfect for a monsoon evening. This low-sodium-friendly recipe is a must-try for pasta lovers.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salt-free water to a boil and cook the penne rigate pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the chimichurri sauce over medium heat and add the sliced red onion.
Add the katsuramuki-cut zucchini and carrots to the skillet and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the vegetables and sauce.
Season with salt-free seasoning and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan cheese.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
